name: nitrograph
description: Find, inspect, and call agent-usable APIs across x402 and MPP with Nitrograph discovery, ranking, call cards, and outcome reporting.

interface.shortDescription: Find and call paid APIs from Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Nitrograph to discover ranked agent-usable APIs for a task, inspect pricing and health, fetch task-aware call cards with endpoint guidance, handle x402/MPP payment challenges correctly, and report successful or failed service outcomes so future searches improve.
defaultPrompt: Find a lead generation API and show the best options with pricing.
Find an image generation service under $0.05 per call.
Find a data enrichment API, inspect the top result, and show me the call card.
